name: Slash Commands
summary: Discovers and manages slash commands from built-in skills, installed plugins, and project-specific skills. Provides autocompletion popup with keyboard navigation in the chat input.
goals: Discover slash commands from built-in, plugin, and project sources
Parse command metadata (name, type, description) from frontmatter
Provide autocompletion popup with filtering and keyboard navigation
Cache commands with 5-minute TTL to reduce server load

acceptanceCriteria.then: a filtered list of matching slash commands appears

acceptanceCriteria.given: The slash command popup is visible
acceptanceCriteria.when: user presses Arrow Up/Down and Enter
acceptanceCriteria.then: the selected command is inserted into the input

unit-test.then: a fresh fetch from the server is triggered

end-to-end.given: Agent panel is open with slash commands available
end-to-end.when: user types '/' and selects a command
end-to-end.then: the command is sent to the agent and executed

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
